query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph looking down a long, straight corridor with white walls, dark carpeted flooring, and rectangular fluorescent ceiling panels extending toward a distant vanishing point. A small figure stands at the far end near a doorway. The hallway features baseboard trim along both walls, a framed picture on the left wall, and an electrical outlet visible in the foreground on the left.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph looking down a long, straight corridor with white walls, dark carpeted flooring, and rectangular fluorescent ceiling panels extending toward a distant vanishing point. A small figure stands at the far end near a doorway. The empty institutional space and stark tonal palette evoke an atmosphere of dread and unease, channeling atmospheric distress through the oppressive repetition of architecture and shadow.
